title: chamaeangis boutonii
intro: Chamaeangis boutonii, also known as the bouton's orchid, is a rare species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chamaeangis boutonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
